name: Smith Douglas Homes Corp.
business: Smith Douglas Homes Corp. is engaged in the design, construction, and sale of single-family homes in the Southeastern and Southern United States, primarily targeting entry-level and empty-nest homebuyers. The company employs a land-light, production-focused business model with an average selling price of approximately $334,000 for homes closed in 2025. It operates ten geographical divisions across two reportable segments (Southeast and Central).

exposures.sentence: We are engaged in the design, construction, and sale of single-family homes in some of the highest growth and most desirable markets in the Southeastern and Southern United States.
